use_cases: Hero sections with dramatic scroll-triggered text reveals
Landing pages featuring animated brand statements and taglines
Product pages with engaging scroll-based storytelling
ai_summary: A scroll-driven text animation component that creates a parallax-like effect where individual characters animate outward from the center as the user scrolls, using Framer Motion's useScroll and useTransform hooks to interpolate x, rotateX, scale, and y transforms across scroll progress for smooth performance.
